steps.title: Use the effort clues
steps.content: The blank describes excavating a stegosaur fossil. The text says the process can take weeks or months of hard, physically tiring work, so the missing word must describe a demanding process.

steps.title: Reject unsupported traits
steps.content: Choice A concerns cost, which the text never mentions. Choice B concerns frequency, not effort. Choice C is contradicted by the weeks-or-months timeline. The word that fits hard, tiring work is difficult. The answer is D.
